# Vendored: SheetJS xlsx

- Source: https://cdn.sheetjs.com/ (authoritative — npm registry is stale at 0.18.5)
- Git: https://git.sheetjs.com/SheetJS/sheetjs
- Current version: 0.20.3
- Why vendored: SheetJS stopped publishing to npm. CDN is the official distribution.
- How to update: `pnpm run update-xlsx --xlsx_version=X.Y.Z`
- Docs: https://docs.sheetjs.com/docs/getting-started/installation/frameworks
